products.title: Handmade Personalised Pocket Mirrors (58mm & 75mm) – Custom Photo or Name Compact Mirrors
products.body_html:
Looking for a personalised pocket mirror that’s stylish, practical and makes the perfect gift? Our handmade 58mm and 75mm custom compact mirrors are designed for teenagers and adults, making them ideal for mums, teens, bridesmaids, birthdays, stocking fillers and thoughtful keepsakes.

Each mirror is carefully handmade with a durable metal casing and high-quality print finish — combining beauty and functionality in one compact design.

 

💫 Special Offer – Limited Time Only

3 x 58mm Personalised Pocket Mirrors – £10
RRP £17.97

OR

3 x 75mm Personalised Pocket Mirrors – £15
RRP £23.97

✔ All three mirrors must feature the same image or name
✔ Perfect for gifts, party favours or small business branding

 

Why You’ll Love Our Custom Compact Mirrors

  • Handmade personalised pocket mirrors (UK seller)

  • Available in 58mm or 75mm sizes

  • Durable metal casing

  • Lightweight & compact for handbags and makeup bags

  • Ideal for makeup touch-ups and everyday use

  • Custom photo pocket mirrors or name personalisation

  • Perfect gift for teenagers & adults

These compact mirrors fit effortlessly into handbags, school bags, cosmetic pouches or even your car — ideal for quick makeup checks and on-the-go moments.

 

 

 

Personalisation Options

You can customise your mirror in one of the following ways:

Option 1: Custom Photo Mirror
Upload your chosen image — perfect for family photos, pets, business logos, memorial keepsakes or special moments.

Option 2: Name Personalised Mirror
Add a name for a clean, stylish personalised design.

⚠ Important:

  • You can choose either a name OR an image (not both).

  • If uploading an image, please enter N/A in the name box.

  • Only the customer selection will be dispatched for the price paid.

 

Perfect For:

  • Personalised gifts for her

  • Birthday gifts

  • Bridesmaid gifts

  • Party favours

  • Small business promotional items

  • Custom logo mirrors

  • Stocking fillers

  • Hen party gifts

 

Safety Information

Not suitable for young children. Please keep away from children due to the glass mirror component. Handle with care as the mirror may break if dropped or damaged.

 

If you’re looking for custom pocket mirrors in the UK, a meaningful personalised gift, or a stylish compact mirror for everyday use — these are the perfect choice.

Order today to secure the special offer while stock lasts.

products.title: Umrah/Hajj Mubarak gift rock slate
products.body_html:
Celebrate a spiritual journey with our exquisitely designed Umrah Mubarak Gift – the perfect keepsake to commemorate the sacred pilgrimage of Hajj or Umrah. This 20cm printed slate is more than just a gift; it's a heartfelt memento that captures the essence of this once-in-a-lifetime experience, making it an ideal Umrah present or a custom family gift that will be treasured for years to come.

Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, each frame is personalized to encapsulate the individuality of your family or the recipient. Made from high-quality materials, the frame boasts a sleek finish that complements any home decor, while the print itself is produced on high quality rock slate for clarity and longevity. Measuring at the convenient size of 20 cm, it's the perfect addition to be placed on a mantle, bringing a touch of elegance and spirituality into the living space.

*******************AFTER CARE********************

To ensure your slate stays as pristine as the memories it holds, keep it out of direct sunlight and gently dust it to maintain its luster.
**************************************************

This bespoke slate isn't just an item you purchase; it's a story you share, a blessing you pass on, and a celebration of faith that unites. With its unique personalization, each slate reflects the individual journey, making it a truly special and one-of-a-kind gift. Our dedication to handcrafted quality, creativity, and authenticity shines through in every piece we create, embodying the spirit of the Etsy community.

Order your Umrah Mubarak Gift today and give the gift of remembrance. Whether it's for a family member, a friend, or for yourself, this umrah slate will stand as a beautiful testament to a profound spiritual experience. Delight in the joy of giving something as meaningful and personalized as the memories of Hajj or Umrah, and let this slate be a beacon of faith and a cherished reminder of the blessings received on this sacred pilgrimage.

products.title: Umrah & Hajj Mubarak Foil Ticket – Islamic Pilgrimage Announcement Gift
products.body_html:
Celebrate the blessing of embarking on Umrah or Hajj with our Umrah & Hajj Mubarak Foil Ticket — a meaningful way to announce a sacred journey.

 

Thoughtfully designed as an Islamic keepsake, this elegant ticket is perfect for surprising loved ones with the honour of performing pilgrimage. Ideal for Umrah announcements, Hajj reveals, or gifting moments filled with intention.

 

Each ticket is crafted on thick, premium white card with a smooth matte finish and delicately foiled for a refined, timeless look. Orders arrive in discreet, letterbox-friendly packaging to keep the surprise intact.

 

 

 

 

Product Details

 

 

  • Approximate size: 20cm × 8.5cm
  • Premium white card with matte finish
  • Elegant foil detailing
  • Protective, discreet packaging

 

 

 

 

 

Dispatch & Delivery

 

 

  • Dispatched within 48 hours (Monday–Friday)
  • Delivery estimates shown at checkout
  • Tracked and next-day delivery options available

 

 

 

 

 

Important Information

 

 

Personalised text is printed exactly as entered. To keep prices accessible, spelling and grammar are not checked, so please review all details carefully before placing your order.

products.title: Handcrafted Kufiya Pocket Mirror
products.body_html:
Celebrate heritage, identity, and beauty with our 75mm Handmade Kufiya Pocket Mirrors, thoughtfully crafted in recognition of the iconic Palestinian kufiya. These stunning pieces are designed to be both meaningful and practical — a perfect keepsake that fits effortlessly into your pocket, handbag, or makeup pouch.

 

Each mirror is individually handmade with love, using a blend of high-quality materials including durable metal, premium mirror glass, Mylar for protection, and beautifully printed paper. Every detail is placed with care to ensure a smooth finish, long-lasting shine, and a design that feels special every time you reach for it.

 

Choose from two meaningful designs, each honouring Palestine in its own beautiful way:

 

✨ colourful flag Print Text  pocket mirror

A striking all-over kufiya pattern that pays homage to the traditional black-and-white design — bold, symbolic, and instantly recognisable.

 

✨ Half Kufiya with Arabic “Palestine”

A unique half-and-half style featuring the classic kufiya pattern paired with elegant Arabic calligraphy spelling “فلسطين” (Palestine). A subtle yet powerful reminder of identity and pride.

 

These mirrors are more than just accessories — they are symbols of resilience, culture, and love for Palestine, carefully made to be cherished or gifted.

 

Perfect for gifting, personal use, or adding to your collection of Palestinian-inspired items.

 

Handmade with passion. Crafted to perfection.

Carry a piece of heritage with you wherever you go. 🇵🇸✨

products.title: Custom Wedding Ring Nameplate
products.body_html:
Celebrate your special day with our exquisite Custom Wedding Ring Nameplate, the perfect addition to any nikah ceremony or wedding. Our nameplates are designed to add a personal touch, making your event unforgettable.

**Features:**
- **Two Sizes Available:** Choose from a 30 cm nameplate with an acrylic finish mirrored plate, or a larger 40 cm nameplate crafted from mirrored glass.
- **Perfect for Muslim Ceremonies:** Ideal for nikah and other Muslim weddings, these custom nameplates can be personalized with your names, wedding date, or a special message.
- **Elegant Design:** Our nameplates are designed to reflect the beauty and significance of your wedding day, adding a touch of elegance and sophistication to your decor.

**Why Choose Our Custom Wedding Ring Nameplate?**
- **High-Quality Materials:** The 20 cm acrylic finish mirrored plate offers a sleek and modern look, while the 30 cm mirrored glass nameplate provides a timeless and luxurious feel.
- **Personalized Touch:** Make your wedding truly unique by customizing your nameplate to reflect your personal style and love story.
- **Versatile Decor:** Perfect for table centerpieces, welcome signs, or photo props, our nameplates seamlessly blend into any wedding theme.

Make your nikah ceremony or wedding day extraordinary with our Custom Wedding Ring Nameplate. Order now and add a touch of elegance and personalization to your special day.

products.title: Hijaabi Graduation Print Frame-Custom
products.body_html:
Celebrate the momentous achievement of graduation with a gift that resonates with faith and inspiration. Our exquisite framed graduation gift is thoughtfully designed to honor the proud milestone in a Muslim graduate's life. Crafted with the utmost care, this stunning piece features the sacred Quranic verse 11:88, beautifully inscribed to inspire and guide the new graduate on their future path.

Constructed with high-quality materials, the frame measures an impressive 11x14 inches, perfect for adorning a wall or standing on a desk. The verse itself is meticulously rendered in elegant calligraphy, set against a serene background that complements any room decor. Our frame is not only a symbol of Islamic education but a timeless keepsake that the graduate will treasure for years to come. To maintain the pristine condition of this framed gift, we recommend placing it in a dry area and cleaning it gently with a soft, dry cloth.

In a world of mass-produced gifts, our handmade Islamic gift stands apart. Each frame is lovingly crafted with attention to detail, ensuring that no two pieces are exactly alike. This unique quality makes our graduation gift a special token of your love and pride in the graduate's accomplishment. Whether it's for a high school, college, or post-graduate achievement, this gift is a beautiful way to show your support and celebrate this significant Islamic milestone in the life of someone dear to you.

When you choose our framed graduation gift, you're not just giving a present; you're offering a meaningful symbol of success intertwined with faith. It's a thoughtful reflection of the graduate's hard work, perseverance, and dedication to Islamic principles. Order now and give a gift that will be cherished as a constant reminder of their incredible journey and the bright future that lies ahead in this blessed year of graduation, 2023.

products.title: Islamic  Umrah/ Hajj Mubarak Frame-Standing
products.body_html:
Celebrate the spiritual journey of Umrah with a heartwarming touch of home décor. Our "Umrah Mubarak"/ "Hajj Mubarak"  framed print is a beautiful tribute to faith and family, capturing the essence of this sacred pilgrimage in a delightful depiction of a Muslim family adorned in ihram and jilbab. Perfect for gracing the walls of your home or as a thoughtful gift, this piece is more than just art—it's a symbol of devotion and unity.

Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, this print is made from high-quality materials ensuring a lasting image that will adorn your space for years to come. The print measures a generous size that is ideal for hanging in your living room, bedroom, or prayer space. Encased in an elegant frame that complements any decor, our Umrah Mubarak print is ready to display right out of the box. To maintain the vibrancy of this piece, simply wipe the frame with a soft, dry cloth when needed.

Not only does this framed print serve as a beautiful reminder of a significant spiritual milestone, but it also showcases the handcrafted quality that Etsy is known for. Each print is created with love and care, ensuring that no two pieces are exactly alike—giving you a unique piece of art that holds personal significance. The image of the Muslim children in this print brings a touch of innocence and joy to the representation of your faith, making it a unique selling point that is sure to captivate the hearts of all who view it.

products.title: Graduation gift | 20cm Slate gifts | 11:88 | Quran | islamic gifts | Muslim gifts |Islamic education | graduation 2023
products.body_html:
🎓 Celebrate a Milestone with Elegance and Faith 🌙

Embark on a journey of recognition and spirituality as you honor the remarkable achievement of graduation with our bespoke 20cm Slate Graduation Gift. This exquisite piece is not just a token of success but a reflection of a deep-rooted Islamic heritage, making it the perfect Islamic gift for the proud graduate in your life.

Handcrafted with the utmost care, our slate gift is etched with the auspicious time of 11:88, a reference that resonates deeply within the Quran, symbolizing knowledge, wisdom, and the passage of time. Each slate is meticulously selected for its quality and durability, ensuring that this keepsake can be cherished for years to come. The natural, earthy texture of the slate is complemented by precise, elegant engraving, making it a sophisticated addition to any room or office space.

This 20cm treasure serves as a daily reminder of the graduate's dedication and the bright future that Islamic education has paved for them. To maintain the pristine condition of your slate, simply wipe it with a soft, damp cloth and avoid the use of harsh chemicals. Its compact size makes it an ideal display piece without overwhelming the space it adorns.

In a world of mass-produced gifts, our Islamic graduation gift stands out as a unique, handcrafted expression of congratulations and faith. Each piece is infused with a personal touch and the kind of authentic creativity that Etsy shoppers treasure. Whether it's a gift for a friend, family member, or a personal keepsake, this slate gift is a thoughtful and meaningful way to commemorate graduation 2023.

By choosing this slate gift, you are not just purchasing a product; you are investing in a piece of art that honors achievement, embodies faith, and celebrates a significant life milestone. Add this special item to your cart today and give the gift of timeless elegance and spiritual connection to the graduate who has worked so diligently to reach this momentous occasion. 🎁✨
